name: Pickled Spinach
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Oil, vegetable (to taste up to 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the torn spinach, cooked bacon crumbles, chopped green pepper, oil (up to 1/2 cup), and vinegar in a bowl.
2. Toss gently until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Chill for at least 15 minutes before serving.
4. Sprinkle additional bacon on top if desired.
5. Serve over lettuce leaves, if available.
